original text:
Dogs over 1 year old 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. URINARY S/O is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated to dissolve struvite uroliths and reduce their recurrence through its urine acidifying properties, a low level of magnesium and a restricted level of high quality protein. Feeding duration: 5 to 12 weeks of dietary treatment are required to dissolve uroliths. If a ur..
Cats and dogs over six months 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. CONVALESCENCE SUPPORT INSTANT DIET is a complete dietetic food intended for dogs and cats for nutritional restoration during convalescence. This food has a high energy level and a high concentration of essential nutrients which are highly digestible. Feeding Duration: According to the veterinarian's assessm..
Diabetic SpecialDogs over 1 year old 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. DIABETIC SPECIAL is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated toregulate the supply of glucose (Diabetes Mellitus). This food contains a low level of rapidly digestible carbohydrates. Feeding Duration: WARNING: feeding this food generally improves the dog's insulin sensitivity. When initiating this d..
Complete dietetic feed for adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. HYPOALLERGENIC is a complete dietetic feed for dogs formulated to reduce ingredient and nutrient intolerances. Selected sources of protein and carbohydrate. Hydrolised protein Soy protein isolate digest, which is composed of low molecular weight peptides, is highly digestible and of very low allergenicity..
心臟處方 EC 26 lete dietetic feed for adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. 犬用心臟病處方飼料是專門針對狗狗的心臟問題所配製的處方飼料,可支持心臟功能.本飼料的鈉含量較低,鉀/鈉比較高. 適應症 高血壓 心臟病/衰竭 (第一期) 心臟病/衰竭 (1至3期) 心臟病/衰竭 (第四期) 心臟病/衰竭 (末期) 避免用於 懷孕期 哺乳期 胰臟炎 高血脂症 成長期 使用建議 本飼料可在發現心臟病症狀後就開始使用.飼料的營養足夠且可持續供應給狗狗. 支持血管 多酚可讓血管舒張及幫助對抗自由基. 支持腎臟功能 心臟處方飼料有適當的..
避免動物缺糧,請預至少7工作天前訂購.Royal Canin GI Low Fat Liquid Dog 狗用 腸胃道處方 (低脂)營養液體食品 200ml x 3支適用於:- 腹瀉; 胰臟炎- 高脂質血症 Feeding RecommendationDog's Weight(kg)Liquidml/dayDog's Weight(kg)Liquidml/day21101448541901653562552063083154010601037560143512430801785 AnimalHospital.com.hk is not resp..
避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. 腸胃道處方是針對腸胃疾病犬的營養管理配方,所選用的成分具有高消化率,提高電解值與基礎營養的特性,能幫助減緩急性腸胃吸收異常,以促進營養的利用與體力恢復. 適應症 慢性及急性下痢 炎症性腸病 (IBD) 吸收不良 消化不良 恢復期 胰臟外分泌缺乏症(EPI) 胃炎 結腸炎 厭食 細菌過度增生 避免用於 高血脂症 淋巴管擴張 肝性腦病變 需低脂飲食的疾病 胰臟炎或胰臟炎病史 使用建議 使用前請先諮詢獸醫師的建議. 急性腸胃病通常需要食用至少3 週以支持腸胃細胞的再生.慢性病時可能需要長期食用.少量多餐有助於維護消化機能. 消化率保障 高消化率蛋白質(L.I.P),益生素(FOS, MOS),甜..
Adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. HEPATIC is a complete dietetic feed for the nutritional management of dogs formulated to support liver function in the case of chronic liver insufficiency and for the reduction of copper in the liver. Moderate level of high quality protein. High level of essential fatty acids and highly digestible carbohydrates. Low level of copper. Indications ..
Renal Wet Complete dietetic feed for adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. ​ RENAL is a complete dietetic feed for dogs formulated to support renal function in the case of chronic or temporary renal insufficiency, through its low level of phosphorus and high quality protein. Indications [chronic_renal_insufficiency_cri] [urate_and_cystine_urolithiasis] ..
Satiety Weight Management Canine 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. Indications Obesity Overweight Diabetes mellitus Hyperlipidaemia Weight management Contraindications Pregnancy Lactation Growth Chronic diseases requiring an increased energy intake. Satietogenic effect High fibre content that limits the spontaneus energy consumption ..
Sensitivity Control with Chicken - CAN Puppies and adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. SENSITIVITY CONTROL Chicken & Rice is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated to reduce ingredient and nutrient intolerances. This diet contains selected sources of protein and carbohydrate. Selected protein: chicken. Selected carbohydrate: rice. Indications [food..
Sensitivity Control with Duck - CAN Puppies and adult dogs 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. SENSITIVITY CONTROL Duck & Rice is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated to reduce ingredient and nutrient intolerances.This diet contains selected sources of protein and carbohydrate. Selected protein: duck. Selected carbohydrate: rice. Indications [food_intoleran..
Recovery Cats/Dogs Cats and dogs over six months 避免動物缺糧,請預至少7天前訂購. RECOVERY is a complete dietetic food for dogs and cats, formulated to promote nutritional restoration during convalescence or in case of feline hepatic lipidosis. With a high energy density, this food contains concentrated essential nutrients and highly digestible ingredients. ..
